_comment: Mid-call state for lbd_agent. Simulates entry after lbd_extract_concepts (seed_concepts populated) and lbd_broad_search (broad_search_results populated) have both completed. The next node lbd_dispatch_concepts will fan out per-concept to lbd_fetch_concept_papers.
query: Novel mechanisms linking pyrethroid resistance to LLIN efficacy loss in Anopheles gambiae
context: Investigating whether rising kdr mutation prevalence in Anopheles populations is a material threat to the LLIN bednet programs being reviewed. Looking for ABC-bridge concepts that connect resistance mechanisms to population-level efficacy outcomes.

broad_search_results.title: Insecticide resistance in malaria vectors: an update at a global scale
broad_search_results.abstract: Systematic review of pyrethroid resistance in Anopheles across Africa. kdr mutations (L1014F, L1014S) documented in >60 countries; metabolic resistance via CYP450s co-occurring in West Africa.

broad_search_results.title: Does pyrethroid resistance affect the efficacy of insecticide-treated bed nets?
broad_search_results.abstract: Meta-analysis of 12 studies. Pyrethroid resistance in local vectors was not consistently associated with reduced LLIN efficacy in RCTs, but association strengthened when resistance was metabolic rather than kdr alone.

broad_search_results.title: Population-level effect of pyrethroid resistance on the efficacy of LLINs in Africa
broad_search_results.abstract: Modelling study estimating that high levels of pyrethroid resistance could reduce LLIN effectiveness by 20–50% depending on resistance type and local mosquito density.
